biopipen.utils 0.4.1
  • Reference

Load expression data from a sample path

Source: R/scrna-utils.R
dot-load_expression_data.Rd

Handles ParseBio, HIVE, 10X directory, loom, and h5 formats.

Usage

.load_expression_data(path, sam, tmpdir, LoadLoomArgs, log)

Arguments

path

Path to the sample data

sam

Sample name

tmpdir

Temporary directory for symlink workaround

LoadLoomArgs

Arguments for SeuratDisk::LoadLoom

log

Logger

Value

A list with exprs (matrix or Seurat object) and cell_meta (data.frame or NULL)

On this page
